About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Long Today's data reveals a dramatically divergent momentum landscape dominated by FUWAY's extraordinary outperformance. FUWAY ranks #1 with a score of 93.1, driven by exceptional long-term returns of 1029.99% over 10 years and 658.59% over 5 years, vastly outpacing SPY by 796.59% and 584.97% respectively over those same periods. In stark contrast, NOC shows solid but more modest momentum with 283.14% 10-year returns and only 49.74% outperformance versus SPY over a decade. Both securities pass all moving average thresholds and show strong ratio progression across timeframes, but FUWAY's "clean" momentum signal and "strong_buy" flag indicate far more compelling long-term secular momentum, while NOC's relative underperformance against SPY at the 10-year mark suggests its strength may be sector-specific rather than broad-based.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
